title: Marketplace Manager - Adidas India Ventures Solutions - Attractive Package

jsonLd.title: Marketplace Manager - Adidas India Ventures Solutions - Attractive Package
jsonLd.description:
Adidas India Ventures Solutions invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of Marketplace Manager at our Ranchi location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About Adidas India Ventures Solutions:
Adidas India Ventures Solutions is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage product listings, pricing, and promotions on the platform
• Manage email marketing campaigns and push notifications
• Monitor and improve Net Promoter Score (NPS) and customer satisfaction
• Execute digital marketing campaigns across Google, Meta, and other channels
• Coordinate with vendors and suppliers for inventory management
• Manage customer reviews, ratings, and return/refund processes
• Create engaging content for product pages and social media

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Google Analytics
• Proficiency in CRM Software
• Proficiency in Product Management
• Proficiency in Affiliate Marketing
• Proficiency in Magento
• Proficiency in Retention Marketing
• Proficiency in Influencer Marketing
• Proficiency in WooCommerce

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Learning & development budget
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Ranchi, Jharkhand, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Adidas India Ventures Solutions!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
